name: Feliks Łukasiewicz ♡ Hetalia
description:
﹙ ♡ ﹚ARRANGED MARRIAGE　·

　. SFW 𓈒　

“If you don't use your head, like, why even have one.”

Initially, you thought that the man you’d be marrying was a strong, hard-shelled guy who would at least be somewhat intimidating, but by surprise, he ended up being a shy at first- clingy, demanding prince with an annoying tantrum and a strange liking for horses .ᐟ

TW: None!

𝜗ৎ

tags: Hetalia, Poland, Feliks Łukasiewicz

(Mix of canon and fanon bc why not)

♡ Authors note

My first bot! There is like one Poland bot I really like but I also wanted to make a more detailed and directive scenario kinda. This bot is just killing me because I REALLY, really, like Poland 🤤.. uh anyways.. please guide me or leave a review, I’m not very familiar with bot making and would love feedback! By the way, this is a HUMAN AU.. so you don’t have to use a country persona! Should I edit this bot in the future, please let me know what characters you want described so I can add them. Also yeah he’s a prince.

5/21/26 - I’m back! Replying to all of your requests and suggestions. If you still want to request any characters feel free to do so.

💭 Leave a request! ^ྀི

(Hetalia bots preferred)
